content.summary: China is the world's second-largest economy and a key market for Indonesian commodities. RCEP provides significant tariff reductions. Regulatory compliance is complex.
content.paymentPreference: L/C strongly recommended for new buyers; T/T for established partners
bestPractices: RCEP reduces tariffs significantly for Indonesian exporters
GACC (General Administration of Customs China) registration required for food facilities
Chinese mandatory certification (CCC) for electronics and safety goods
Import quotas may apply for certain agricultural products
